title: marrubium supinum
intro: Marrubium supinum, also known as Syrian marrubium or white Marrubium, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Marrubium supinum include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as reducing inflammation and soothing digestive issues. Marrubium supinum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also sometimes used as a topical application for skin conditions.
